plugins.prepareCmd: mkdir -p ./release-evidence && dotnet build --configuration Release -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet pack --no-build --configuration Release --include-symbols --include-source --output ./nupkgs -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet CycloneDX Hexalith.FrontComposer.sln -o ./release-evidence/sbom --json --disable-github-licenses && python eng/release_evidence.py inventory --root . --expected eng/release-package-inventory.json --output ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json && dotnet nuget sign ./nupkgs/*.nupkg --certificate-path "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PATH" --certificate-password "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD" --timestamper "$NUGET_SIGNING_TIMESTAMPER" --output ./nupkgs-signed && dotnet nuget verify ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --all --verbosity normal > ./release-evidence/signing-verification.txt && python eng/release_evidence.py release-budget --evidence ./release-evidence/release-budget-history.json --append-current --started-at "$RELEASE_STARTED_AT" --tag v${nextRelease.version} --run-id "$GITHUB_RUN_ID" --publish-status pre-publish --output ./release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json && python eng/release_evidence.py checksums --root . --pattern 'nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg' --pattern 'nupkgs/*.snupkg' --pattern 'release-evidence/sbom/**/*.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/signing-verification.txt' --pattern 'release-evidence/attestation-unavailable.md' --pattern 'release-evidence/test-results.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json' --output ./release-evidence/checksums.json && python eng/release_evidence.py prepare-manifest --root . --inventory ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json --checksums ./release-evidence/checksums.json --signing-verification ./release-evidence/signing-verification.txt --version ${nextRelease.version} --tag v${nextRelease.version} --benchmark-summary-hash "$(sha256sum ./release-evidence/release-budget-prepublish.json | cut -d' ' -f1)" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --output ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --diagnostics-output ./release-evidence/manifest-diagnostics.json && python eng/release_evidence.py seal-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --root . --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/release-verification.json
plugins.publishCmd: python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --root . --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && python eng/release_evidence.py classify-release --root . --evidence-root ./release-evidence --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --test-results ./release-evidence/test-results.json --output ./release-evidence/release-readiness.json --require-publishable --semantic-release-state matches --concurrent-same-version "$RELEASE_CONCURRENT_SAME_VERSION" --event-name "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" --ref "$GITHUB_REF" --ref-protected "$GITHUB_REF_PROTECTED" --from-fork "$RELEASE_FROM_FORK" --dry-run "$RELEASE_DRY_RUN" --run-attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT:-1}" --owner-approved "$RELEASE_OWNER_APPROVED" --approver "$RELEASE_APPROVER" --approval-mechanism "$RELEASE_APPROVAL_MECHANISM" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --fallback-approver "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVER" --fallback-expires-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_EXPIRES_AT" && (dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate || (python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json --phase package-push --tag v${nextRelease.version} && exit 1)) && (dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs/*.snupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate || (python eng/release_evidence.py partial-publish-incident --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json --phase symbol-push --tag v${nextRelease.version} && exit 1))
